mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_salary (employee_id, id_card, job_category_name, salary_period, salary_type, base_salary, attendance_days, base_amount, addition_amount, deduction_amount, payable_amount, remark, approve_remark, created_by, project_id, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{idCard}, #{jobCategoryName}, #{salaryPeriod}, #{salaryType}, #{baseSalary}, #{attendanceDays}, #{baseAmount}, #{additionAmount}, #{deductionAmount}, #{payableAmount}, #{remark}, #{approveRemark}, #{createdBy}, #{projectId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_salary SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, id_card = #{idCard}, job_category_name= #{jobCategoryName}, salary_period = #{salaryPeriod}, salary_type = #{salaryType}, base_salary = #{baseSalary}, attendance_days = #{attendanceDays}, base_amount = #{baseAmount}, addition_amount = #{additionAmount}, deduction_amount = #{deductionAmount}, payable_amount = #{payableAmount}, remark = #{remark}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.employee_id, s.salary_period, s.salary_type, s.base_salary, s.attendance_days, s.base_amount, s.addition_amount, s.deduction_amount, s.payable_amount, s.remark, s.approve_remark, s.project_id, s.created_time, s.updated_time, e.name AS employee_name, e.id_card AS id_card, e.phone AS phone, jc.name AS job_category_name FROM tb_salary s LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON s.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.base_amount), 0) AS totalBaseAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.addition_amount), 0) AS totalAdditionAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.deduction_amount), 0) AS totalDeductionAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.payable_amount), 0) AS totalPayableAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT s.salary_period) AS approvedMonths FROM tb_salary s INNER JOIN tb_salary_month_status sms ON s.project_id = sms.project_id AND s.salary_period COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = sms.`year_month` COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE s.project_id = #{projectId} AND s.salary_period LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') AND sms.status = 5

SELECT s.employee_id AS employeeId, MAX(e.name) AS employeeName, MAX(e.phone) AS phone, MAX(s.id_card) AS idCard, MAX(s.job_category_name) AS jobCategoryName, COUNT(DISTINCT s.salary_period) AS monthCount, COALESCE(SUM(s.base_amount), 0) AS baseAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.addition_amount), 0) AS additionAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.deduction_amount), 0) AS deductionAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.payable_amount), 0) AS payableAmount FROM tb_salary s LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON s.employee_id = e.id INNER JOIN tb_salary_month_status sms ON s.project_id = sms.project_id AND s.salary_period COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = sms.`year_month` COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE s.project_id = #{projectId} AND s.salary_period LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') AND sms.status = 5 GROUP BY s.employee_id ORDER BY MAX(e.name) ASC

SELECT s.*, e.name AS employee_name FROM tb_salary s LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON s.employee_id = e.id INNER JOIN tb_salary_month_status sms ON s.project_id = sms.project_id AND s.salary_period COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = sms.`year_month` COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE s.project_id = #{projectId} AND s.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND s.salary_period LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') AND sms.status = 5 ORDER BY s.salary_period ASC
